title: Choosing the Right Funding Opportunity — D-RED Seminar Slides (Isuk)
display_label: Choosing the Right Funding Opportunity Slides (2021-06-09)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2021-06-09 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Choosing the Right Funding Opportunity' presented by Edet Isuk, PhD. YouTube recording: https://youtu.be/P2ncgx_Qm-o. Helps PIs decide which solicitations to pursue based on fit, fundability, and timing.
